calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-18-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rhonda Fung.
Petitioner: Tiana Blunt, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for and with the Minor: Ayoluwa Jibri Anderson, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Ayoluwa Jibri Hightower.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-20-2005 Reset To Oct-18-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Petitioner: Tiana Blunt, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Ayoluwa Jibri Anderson, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Oct. 18, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit an Application, Declaration, and Order Dispensing Notice.
